response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience and strong TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS CDK background, plus recent and directly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume shows little evidence of the 8+ years building production GenAI solutions the role demands, and key requirements—RAG architectures, vector databases, data pipelines for unstructured data, and multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI—are absent or only implied. Python (a core listed language) is not in the skill set. Worth a screening conversation to probe the depth of the recent AI work, but the GenAI specialization is unproven.
strengths: Deep senior/staff engineering track record with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling
Strong testing/craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD) and demonstrated mentoring/teaching
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years shipping production GenAI/AI-driven solutions
RAG, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks not demonstrated
Python listed as core role language but absent from skills
